name: Prince Maxim

sheet.name: Prince Maxim
sheet.background_story:
Estranged nephew to King Offling who, upon hearing of his uncle's questing, left home and sought a similar adventure.

Finding himself shunned by his parents for risking the crown, he was disowned.

With no royal guard, he personally hired two mercenaries to protect him — Sir Benedict and Ranger Viola.

When Ranger Viola did not return from The Battle of the Burning Church, he the prince began to fear his expense of her had been in vain and felt a haste to make the most of his time with Sir Benedict.

Since The Second Expedition to The Void, he has been stalked by a shadow reflection of himself.

description:

When Ranger Viola did not return from The Battle of the Burning Church, he the prince began to fear his expense of her had been in vain and felt a haste to make the most of his time with Sir Benedict.

Since The Second Expedition to The Void, he has been stalked by a shadow reflection of himself.
